items.title: MRF Q3FY26 result: Profit more than doubles to ₹692 cr, dividend declared
items.description: MRF's Q3 revenue from operations increased 15 per cent Y-o-Y to ₹8,050.43 crore from ₹7,000.82 crore in Q3FY25. Sequentially, revenue was up 9.1 per cent from ₹7,378.72 crore in Q2FY26
